subject: Social Sciences
title: Birth of Democracy
tagline: Relive 1994 — understand the negotiated settlement and first elections!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What year was South Africa's first democratic election?

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What document is the supreme law of South Africa?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Constitution is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Constitution.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What body drafted South Africa's Constitution?
options: All adult citizens have the right to vote
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Constitutional Assembly is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Constitutional Assembly.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What does the Bill of Rights protect?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Citizens' fundamental rights and freedoms is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Citizens' fundamental rights and freedoms.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What is South Africa's system of government?
options: To ensure laws align with the Constitution
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A constitutional democracy is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A constitutional democracy.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: How many branches does South Africa's government have?
options: To ensure laws align with the Constitution
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Three (executive, legislative, judicial) is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Three (executive, legislative, judicial).

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: What is the role of the Constitutional Court?
options: To ensure laws align with the Constitution
stages.correctOption: To ensure laws align with the Constitution
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! To ensure laws align with the Constitution is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is To ensure laws align with the Constitution.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What is 'separation of powers'?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Dividing government into independent branches is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Dividing government into independent branches.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What does universal suffrage mean?
options: All adult citizens have the right to vote
stages.correctOption: All adult citizens have the right to vote
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! All adult citizens have the right to vote is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is All adult citizens have the right to vote.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: Who was South Africa's first democratically elected president?
options: All adult citizens have the right to vote
To ensure laws align with the Constitution
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Nelson Mandela is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Nelson Mandela.
